title: TypeCheck (‘is’) and Cast (‘as’) in Kotlin
summary: Type check is a way of checking the type( DataType ) or Class of a particular instance or variable while runtime to separate the flow for different objects. In few languages, it’s also denoted as Run Time Type Identification (RTTI) .
content: Type check is a way of checking the type(DataType) or Class of a particular instance or variable while runtime to separate the flow for different objects. In few languages, it’s also denoted as Run Time Type Identification (RTTI).
